name: Sweet and Sour Stuffed Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. CAREFULLY CUT AROUND THE CABBAGE CORE and place the head in boiling water for about 10 minutes. Remove and let drain. This will make the cabbage leaves limp and easier to work with.
2. When the cabbage is cool enough to handle, remove eight leaves.
3. Meanwhile, mix the ground beef with the cracked wheat, mustard, egg, salt, and pepper, and milk.
4. Divide the mixture into eight equal portions, placing a portion on the stem end of each cabbage leaf, and roll up. The ends of the rolls can be trimmed and then tucked in.
5. Place the rolls seam sides down in a circle in a 3-quart microwaveable casserole.
6. Mix together the brown sugar, tomato sauce, and lemon juice.
7. Pour the mixture over the stuffed cabbage rolls.
8. Cover the casserole tightly and MICROWAVE ON HIGH for 7 to 10 minutes. Check for doneness. Be careful not to overcook as the cabbage leaves can become tough.
9. Makes four servings.
